title: KandyToys Hand Held Wind Up Ice Cream Fan - (3 Colurs, 1 Colour Sent at Random)
features: N.B 3 Colours available, 1 Colour Sent at Random
Brightly coloured wind up ice cream shaped fan
description: These brightly coloured hand held wind up ice cream shaped fans are great for keeping cool in the hot sticky heat of summer, or when you just need a blast of air blowing on you. They are great for the office, car, stadium or anywhere else you can think. These fans are a perfect size to fit into a handbag or sports bag making these great for taking with you anywhere you want to keep cool. The fans operate simply by turning the handle on the side to turn the soft flexible fan blades and generate a cooling breeze. N.B 3 Colours available, 1 Colour Sent at Random
